name: Wizard: idea chips, option pick, refine loop
description: The strategy wizard offers one-click idea chips; picking an audience card highlights it and pre-fills feedback; refining folds the steer into the draft and logs the turn.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app and start a new campaign from an idea (the 'New campaign from an idea' entry on Home, or the wizard shown to a tenant with no campaigns).
Verify suggestion chips are visible under the idea box, including one about an agentic testing platform that verifies AI-generated code.
Verify the idea textarea is now filled with the chip's text.
Click 'Think it through' and wait for the draft to finish.
Verify a staged thinking indicator was shown while the draft was loading (not just a frozen button).
Verify the draft shows 'What I heard', audience candidates under 'Who it's really for', and positioning angles.
Click one of the audience candidate cards.
Verify the clicked card is visibly selected (highlighted) and the feedback box is scrolled into view pre-filled with a steer about that audience.
Click 'Refine with this' and wait for the refined draft.
Verify a 'How we got here' section lists the turns including the steer that was just submitted.
